description: The state of being aware; having subjective experience of self and world. 'Waeli' names what wakes—the difference between sleeping and knowing.
sound_symbolism: The word wakes gently. 'Wa' opens with wondering awareness, attention stirring. 'E' eases into present clarity. Then 'li' lifts with light recognition, consciousness bright.
grammatical_notes: Functions as adjective: 'waeli miona' (conscious person). As noun: 'lo waeli' (consciousness itself). Related to 'thenu' (aware) but deeper—full sentient experience.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Conscious choice—the aware decision-making that creates positive futures.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Consciousness as foundation—awareness being the ground of all experience, to be investigated.
